summary: Comprehensive testing of 11 new features for POS System - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend: 25/25 tests passed. Frontend: All pages loading correctly, all components functional.
passed_tests: ✓ Feature 1: Report Export (Excel) - /api/reports/export/sales returns Excel file
✓ Feature 1: Report Export (Excel) - /api/reports/export/inventory returns Excel file
✓ Feature 2: Profit Analysis - /api/reports/profit-analysis returns revenue, cost, profit, margin data
✓ Feature 3: Customer Purchase History - /api/customers/{id}/purchase-history works
✓ Feature 4: Loyalty Points - /api/customers/{id}/points/add works
✓ Feature 4: Loyalty Points - /api/customers/{id}/points/redeem works
✓ Feature 4: Balance Topup - /api/customers/{id}/balance/topup works
✓ Feature 5: Audit Log - /api/audit-logs returns paginated log entries
✓ Feature 5: Audit Log - Filters by action and target_type work
✓ Feature 6: Promotions - CRUD operations (create/read/update/delete) all work
✓ Feature 7: Accounts Receivable - Create and list receivables work
✓ Feature 7: Accounts Payable - Create and list payables work
✓ Feature 7: Mark Payment - /api/accounts/{id}/pay updates payment status
✓ Feature 8: Data Backup - /api/backup/export returns JSON with all collections
✓ Feature 9: Dashboard Trends - /api/dashboard/trends returns 7-day and 30-day data
✓ Feature 10: Role Permissions - /api/auth/permissions returns role-based permissions
✓ Feature 11: Report Export Buttons - Both buttons present in Reports page UI
✓ UI: Dashboard page loads with sales trend chart and 7d/30d toggle
✓ UI: Profit Analysis page loads with summary cards and profit table
✓ UI: Promotions page loads with CRUD interface
✓ UI: Accounts page loads with receivable/payable tabs
✓ UI: Audit Log page loads with action and type filters
✓ UI: Customer detail dialog shows purchase history, points, balance
✓ UI: System Settings page shows data backup export button
✓ UI: All new navigation items present in admin sidebar

features_verified.report_export_excel: PASS - Both sales and inventory export endpoints return Excel files
features_verified.profit_analysis: PASS - Endpoint returns total_revenue=$39, total_cost=$30, total_profit=$9, margin=23.1%
features_verified.customer_purchase_history: PASS - Returns orders list, total_spent, order_count
features_verified.loyalty_points_balance: PASS - Points add/redeem and balance topup all work
features_verified.audit_log: PASS - Returns paginated logs with action/target_type filters
features_verified.promotions_engine: PASS - Full CRUD with discount types (%, flat, full_reduction, buy_get)
features_verified.accounts_receivable_payable: PASS - Create records, list, mark partial/full payment
features_verified.dashboard_sales_trends: PASS - Returns daily sales data with toggle for 7/30 days
features_verified.role_permissions: PASS - Returns role (admin) and permissions object
features_verified.report_export_buttons_ui: PASS - Both buttons visible in Reports page

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 11 new features verified in UI

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_NewYearSale promotion (deleted), TEST_Customer_A receivable ($500), TEST_Supplier_B payable ($300), UI Test Promo promotion
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 new features are fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints tested: /api/reports/profit-analysis, /api/audit-logs, /api/promotions (CRUD), /api/accounts/receivable, /api/accounts/payable, /api/accounts/{id}/pay, /api/backup/export, /api/dashboard/trends, /api/customers/{id}/purchase-history, /api/customers/{id}/points/add, /api/customers/{id}/points/redeem, /api/customers/{id}/balance/topup, /api/auth/permissions, /api/reports/export/sales, /api/reports/export/inventory. Frontend pages tested: Dashboard (with trends chart), ProfitAnalysisPage, PromotionsPage, AccountsPage, AuditLogPage, CustomersPage (with detail dialog), ReportsPage (with export buttons), SystemSettingsPage (with backup button). All new sidebar navigation items are present.
